source_document: ISBA/30/C/CRP.5 (11 July 2025) — Updated draft list of Standards and/or Guidelines associated with the draft regulations on exploitation of Mineral resources in the Area

phases_explanation.phase_1: Standards and guidelines deemed necessary to be in place by the time of adoption of the draft regulations on exploitation.
phases_explanation.phase_2: Standards and guidelines deemed necessary to be in place before the receipt of an application of a plan of work for exploitation.
phases_explanation.phase_3: Standards and guidelines deemed necessary to be in place before commercial mining activities commence in the Area.
phases_explanation.note_brackets: Items marked [1] or [1]/[2] in the source document indicate phase assignments that remain under discussion. [] indicates phase is not yet determined. These are reproduced as listed in ISBA/30/C/CRP.5.

development_status_legend.prepared: Guideline/standard is developed — ISBA/27/C/x document exists (bold in source). Some of these still need to be updated by the LTC and/or a standard component still needs to be developed.
development_status_legend.under_development: Currently under development by the LTC.
development_status_legend.tor_prepared: Terms of Reference for development have been prepared by the LTC.
development_status_legend.in_suspense_document: Developed and contained in the revised suspense document (ISBA/30/C/CRP.2/Rev.1).
development_status_legend.to_be_developed: To be developed by the LTC and followed by transparent stakeholder consultation.
development_status_legend.to_be_merged: Proposed to be included/merged into another standard or guideline.

standards_and_guidelines.development_note: Guideline is developed. To be considered whether a standard also should be developed. To be updated by the LTC.

standards_and_guidelines.title: Draft standard and guidelines on the inspection procedures, inspection reports and the preparation of the rules and operating procedures
standards_and_guidelines.development_note: To be considered whether it should be further subdivided. For Inspectors Code of Conduct, see suspense document (ISBA/30/C/CRP.2/Rev.1), draft regulation 97. For ROP, see suspense document, draft regulation 96bis and 102. To be developed by the LTC (with implementation of the content placed in the suspense document) and followed by transparent stakeholder consultation.

annexes: Annex VI, B (2) (in the Suspension Document)

standards_and_guidelines.title: Draft standard on the Financial Terms of a Contract
standards_and_guidelines.phase_note: [] [1] — phase not yet determined / under discussion
standards_and_guidelines.development_note: DR 63: Suggested consideration of implementation of compensation mechanism to land based mining countries or potentially in a separate standard. Implement outstanding aspects such as on DR 54, 63, 64-64qui.

subject_areas.application_process: Application and plan of work procedures
subject_areas.environmental_management: Environmental management systems, monitoring plans, thresholds, discharges
subject_areas.financial_environmental: Environmental Performance Guarantee, Environmental Compensation Fund
subject_areas.financial_contractual: Financial terms of contract, insurance, security arrangements
subject_areas.safety: Vessels and installations, emergency response, hazard identification, health and safety, training, maritime security
subject_areas.data_information: Data handling, confidential information, environmental data access
subject_areas.contractual: Transfer of rights, joint arrangements, contract modification, suspension, termination, expiration
subject_areas.compliance_enforcement: Inspection procedures, notifiable events, remote monitoring, annual reporting
subject_areas.governance_participation: Stakeholder participation, stakeholder consultation, coastal States consultation

isba_27_phase1_documents.note: The ten Phase 1 standards and guidelines (ISBA/27/C/3 through ISBA/27/C/12) were prepared by the Legal and Technical Commission and released for the Council's consideration in January 2022. They are marked in bold in ISBA/30/C/CRP.5 as already prepared. All still require updates by the LTC.

session_31_sg_status.note: As of ISBA/31 Session Part I (March 2026), no new dedicated Standards and Guidelines CRP document was published. ISBA/31/C/CRP.5 relates to the Compliance Committee, not S&G. The most current S&G list remains ISBA/30/C/CRP.5 (11 July 2025). The Council held a high-level discussion on S&G during ISBA/30 Part I (27 March 2025). Further development of S&G continues under the thematic approach established by ISBA/30/C/18.
